Name: Minimun time since the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and 'Unassign Editor' are performed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Editor'

Name: Minimun waiting time to the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' in the scientific paper review process
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Minimun time it takes the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' to be done after 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time from 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' to the first 'SW-Reviewer Declined'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time between consecutive 'SW-Reviewer Declined' events in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time until 'SW-Reviewer Declined' is performed for manuscripts that eventually receive 'RW-EIC Accept'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and the end of case where activity 'RW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Total time for 'SW-Reviewer Declined' in the variant with the longest overall performance time
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Total time since the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late' are performed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Total waiting time to the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' across all ACM journal review cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time it takes 'SW-Reviewer Declined' after the execution of 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total resolution time of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Percentage of total case time spent waiting for 'SW-Reviewer Declined' response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: The time between the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and the next 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' and 'SW-Reviewer Declined'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time until 'SW-Reviewer Declined' from the start of the 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' to 'SW-Reviewer Declined'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time to 'SW-Reviewer Declined' since the 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' compared to 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: 'SW-Reviewer Declined' Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Declined' to 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' in major revision tracks
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time between 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' in the process variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Impact of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' duration on the total time to 'SW-EIC Major Revision' decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Time between 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and the initiation of the 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection' phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'
